name: Mets Mobility Transportation

name: Good Wheels Inc
service_types: formerly NEMT/paratransit for disabled and disadvantaged riders in Lee, Charlotte, Hendry, Glades, Collier counties
districts_or_customers: formerly SW Florida counties — Lee, Charlotte, Hendry, Glades, Collier
recent_news: Good Wheels suspended/ceased operations February 19, 2020, laying off ~85 employees after ~$1M in unpaid receivables from federal/state agencies and an SBA lien of $257K (WINK News, Fox4). Phone (239) 768-2900 traces to Fort Myers HQ at 8290 College Pkwy.
fit_notes: Defunct since Feb 2020 — not an acquirable operating business. Was a SW Florida nonprofit paratransit/NEMT (not school-bus). Skip.
